free_text: Neutron transmission measurements on gallium in the
resonance region
120 MeV electron linac (peak current
of 3 A, pulse width of 25 ns, repetition rate of
Neutrons obtained by irradiation of water
cooled Ta by electron beam.
Neutron beam diameter is 35 mm.
Natural Ga2O3 powder heated to 400 deg-C in air and
packed in two Al cases placed at 1 m downstream from
the monitor detector:
- 120 mm x 80 mm x 2 mm thick   (0.00215 at/b)
- 40 mm diam x 20 mm thick      (0.0258 at/b)
- 40 mm diam x (20+20) mm thick (0.0510 at/b)
Flight path length of 47.38 m
6Li glass detectors:
- flux monitor (transmission type);
- neutron detector (NE912, 38 mm in diam., 12.7 mm
thick) at 1.5 m downstream from the sample.
The background was estimated by saturation resonances.
Oxygen cross section 3.85-0.002 En (barn) assumed.
A.P.T.
A.P.T. Japan code changed to JPN
On. Major rev. in 002-004. 005-008 added.
On. Major revision in 002.
